content.en:
Ye Tian used the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast to explore this Soul Splitting Red Light area, and although he encountered some Soul Splitting Red Beasts, he did not encounter an attack.

"Sure enough, these Soul Splitting Red Beasts didn't attack me!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

These Soul Splitting Red Beasts didn't seem to have much intelligence, and they didn't communicate much with each other, which also made Ye Tian's Soul Splitting Red Beast's body reduce the risk of being discovered.

As time passed, Ye Tian gradually discovered that this area had also bred good things.

On this day, for example, he found a red spar.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian didn't find the use of this red spar at first, and he didn't recognize it.

Even if it is a nine-story building, it is impossible to know all the materials and resources, and many unknown resources need to be excavated and discovered by themselves to know their true use.

And this red spar is undoubtedly an unknown resource.

Subsequently, Ye Tian excavated a little red spar in this area, and then brought it out, and studied the use of this red spar by his own copy body, even if it was harmful, he would not worry.

After a long period of research and testing, Ye Tian finally knew the effect of this red spar.

"This red spar can actually temper the will and improve the quality of the will!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It can be said that the red spar is very gentle compared to the crystallization of the red light of the Soul Splitting, and the erosion of the will is very weak.

After possessing the Soul Splitting Ancestral Endowment, the red spar would hardly be harmful to him, only the benefit of refining and improving his will.

"If I get enough red crystals, I can even raise my will to the level of immeasurable will!"

As soon as Ye Tian thought of this, his heart was extremely excited.

Immeasurable will, originally even he was not sure that he would be able to condense it when he was in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, because the difficulty was really too great!

Although his current will is close to the immeasurable will, in fact, it is still far, far away, even if it is really only one step, it is a world of difference!

Now, with the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast and the discovery of this red spar, he has great hope of raising his will to the realm of immeasurable will.

The next step is to collect this red hedron.

"This red spar is the energy variant crystallization of the Soul Splitting Red Light, so it's called the Soul Splitting Red Crystal!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Cut off the forbidden area, the Soul Splitting Red Light area.

Ye Tian searched carefully, and there were more and more Soul Splitting Red Crystals on his body.

However, the Soul Splitting Red Crystal is also helpful to the Soul Splitting Red Beast, but the effect is not to temper the will.

Strictly speaking, the Soul Splitting Red Beast does not follow the path of a cultivator, so without the will of a cultivator, there is no such thing as an immeasurable will.

However, the Soul Splitting Red Beast has a soul, and this Soul Splitting Red Crystal can strengthen the soul, refine the bloodline, and improve cultivation.

Therefore, the Soul Splitting Red Beast would also look for this Soul Splitting Red Crystal, which made it difficult for Ye Tian to collect it.

However, there are not many Soul Breaker Red Beasts, and their intelligence is very low, and their use of Soul Breaker Red Crystal is even lower, so they will only eat it when they see it, and they will not specifically look for it.

Otherwise, with his strength, he wouldn't be able to rob other Soul Splitting Red Beasts here.

Every once in a while, Ye Tian would send out a batch of Soul Splitting Red Crystals, lest this replica body accidentally fall, resulting in the loss of the Soul Splitting Red Crystals on his body, which would be a big loss!

And Ye Tian refined these Soul Splitting Red Crystals in the outside world, and constantly used these Soul Splitting Red Crystals to improve his will.

Gradually, Ye Tian's will became stronger and stronger, even surpassing many half-step Ninefold Ancestors.

In the blink of an eye, a long time passed, and Ye Tian's will was raised to the point where it was almost impossible to advance.

At this time, he knew that he had reached the limit of his current will, and if he went further, it would be an immeasurable will.

Ye Tian knew that it was very difficult to condense an immeasurable will if he wanted to cross this shackle, and it was not easy to break this shackle.

Even if the effect of the Soul Splitting Red Crystal is very good, if you want to break this shackle, I am afraid that you need a large amount of Soul Splitting Red Crystal.

"Continue to collect Soul Splitting Red Crystals first, wait until you have enough Soul Splitting Red Crystals, and then break the shackles of will in one breath and condense the immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian planned so.

......

this day.

Ye Tian's Soul Splitting Red Beast slowly probed in the Soul Splitting Red Light area, and at this time he had already come to a farther area, after all, there was no Soul Splitting Red Crystal to be found in the nearby area.

And if he wanted to obtain a large amount of Soul Splitting Red Crystal, he could only go deep into the Soul Splitting Red Light area.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian found a large number of Soul Splitting Red Beasts, and this number exceeded the number of Soul Splitting Red Beasts he had seen before.

"Soul Breaker Red Beast's Lair!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, this Soul Splitting Red Beast's lair seemed to be in a Soul Splitting Red Crystal vein, as he sensed an extremely rich Soul Splitting Red Crystal aura.

"I think I can blend into this lair!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he tried to enter the mountain range, but was not stopped.

Obviously, this Soul Breaker Red Beast's lair allows an alien Soul Breaker Red Beast to enter.

So, Ye Tian blended into this Soul Splitting Red Beast lair like this.

Subsequently, Ye Tian discovered that this Soul Splitting Red Beast's lair was very powerful, there were at least ten Soul Splitting Red Beasts that were comparable to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor level alone, and there were about a hundred Soul Splitting Red Beasts at the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor level.

This scale in the Silent Black Sea is enough to match the big forces, although it is not as good as the top big forces such as the Nine Towers and the Ten Dao Mountains, but it is also very terrifying!

In addition, the Soul Splitting Red Beast of the Ninefold Ancestor level has not been weak in intelligence, and has formulated a series of rules.

For example, it is not allowed to excavate the nearby Soul Splitting Red Crystal, otherwise if the Soul Splitting Red Crystal is excavated, it will be more difficult for the Soul Splitting Red Beast Lair to give birth to a clan.

Therefore, those Ninefold Ancestors simply restricted the excavation of this Soul Splitting Red Crystal under the lair.

However, there are no restrictions on the mining of Soul Breaker Red Crystals elsewhere.

For example, in the area not far away, there are still some small Soul Splitting Red Crystal veins, but there are no Soul Splitting Red Beasts to excavate, after all, their intelligence is not high, even if they know that Soul Splitting Red Crystal is a good thing, it is impossible to take the initiative to cultivate and improve.

So, this is cheap Ye Tian.

He went to those small Soul Splitting Red Crystal veins, took the initiative to excavate, and collected a large number of Soul Splitting Red Crystals.

"Fortunately, these Soul Splitting Red Crystals are not helpful to the dozen or so Ninefold Ancestor Soul Splitting Red Crystals, so they won't compete for the Soul Splitting Red Crystals here, otherwise I wouldn't be qualified to dig them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After collecting enough Soul Splitting Red Crystals, Ye Tian secretly left and sent these Soul Splitting Red Crystals out.

After a few successions, Ye Tian had already collected a large number of Soul Splitting Red Crystals!
